clips.title: The Hotel
clips.prompt: Cinematic VFX, impossible infinite loop. A person walks steadily down an ornate hotel corridor with patterned carpet and endless identical doors, but the hallway never ends — it loops impossibly back on itself, the same stretch repeating forever as the camera glides with them. A person in a coat. Endless recursive hallway, seamless impossible loop, uncanny, 24fps.

clips.title: The Mirrors
clips.prompt: Cinematic VFX, impossible infinite loop. A person walks down a corridor lined with mirrors on both sides, their reflections repeating into infinity, the hallway looping impossibly with no end as the camera glides forward with them. A person in stylish clothes. Endless recursive mirrored hallway, seamless impossible loop, uncanny, 24fps.

A person in plain clothes. Endless recursive liminal hallway, seamless impossible loop, uncanny, 24fps.
